name: Ed Shaughnessy
abstract: Edwin Thomas Shaughnessy (January 29, 1929 – May 24, 2013) was a swing music and jazz drummer long associated with Doc Severinsen and a member of The Tonight Show Band on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson.

interviews.title: Ed Shaughnessy Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 1, 1995 [interview 2 of 2]
Ed Shaughnessy Part II interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 25, 1998 [interview 1 of 2]

concerts.label: The New York Pops: Doc's Big Band Salute to Skitch
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Sonny Igoe
about_quotes.evidence: A very famous drummer, he and I became very good friends over the years, Ed Shaughnessy. And we were sort of like, as we got older, friendly rivals.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sonny Igoe interviewed by Monk Rowe, Emerson, New Jersey, July 31, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: I met the drummer whose name was Ed Shaughnessy and we went to the Florida Club to have a drink with he and Roy.

about_quotes.speaker: Joe LaBarbera
about_quotes.evidence: So I ended up playing with the Tonight Show band for about thirty minutes, maybe forty minutes... with Ed’s drumset
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe LaBarbera interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 15, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Ralph Sutton
about_quotes.evidence: And in the band he had Max Kaminsky, Jack Lesberg, Peanuts Hucko, Eddie Shaughnessy on drums and myself on piano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ralph Sutton interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 22, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Dave McKenna
about_quotes.evidence: The first record I made was that first trip with Charlie Ventura... Ed Shaughnessy was the drummer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave McKenna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Derrick Gardner
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I had to chuckle because I read a quote of yours and it was almost exactly a quote that I got from Ed Shaughnessy years ago... [INTERVIEWEE] You’re not doing your job, that’s right. Yeah. Yeah, Basie said the same thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Derrick Gardner interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 9, 2013
